habitat: Mesoamerican origin; major production in Madagascar, Indonesia, Mexico.
traditionalUsesEn: Culinary flavoring; traditional Mesoamerican use with cacao beverages.
activeCompounds: Vanillin and related phenolics (develop during curing)
preparation: Extracts and whole beans in food; not typically a medicinal tea.
cautions: Food use. Synthetic vanillin common in cheap products.
floweringSeason: Epiphytic orchid; flowers hand-pollinated in cultivation
historicalNotes: Totonac and Aztec heritage; second-most expensive spice after saffron often.
habitatDe: Mesoamerican Herkunft; Hauptanbau in Madagascar, Indonesia, Mexiko.
activeCompoundsDe: Vanillin und related phenolics (develop during curing)
preparationDe: Extracts und whole beans in food; not typically a medicinal Tee.
